name: Warm Water PV Controller
description: Intelligent control for warm water systems with PV surplus detection and circulation management

target.label: Parameter
target.description: Input parameter for warm water control

defaultActive.label: Default active
defaultActive.description: Whether the controller is active by default

reactivateEnabled.label: Auto-reactivate
reactivateEnabled.description: Enables automatic reactivation after a block pause

gridLowerThreshold.label: Minimum feed-in (W)
gridLowerThreshold.description: Minimum grid feed-in in watts for this condition. Surplus mode activates immediately once reached (e.g. 3000 W)

gridUpperThreshold.label: Minimum feed-in (W)
gridUpperThreshold.description: Minimum grid feed-in in watts for this condition. Must be held stable over the stabilisation time (e.g. 5000 W)

gridStabilizeTime.label: Stabilisation time
gridStabilizeTime.description: How long the minimum feed-in must be held continuously before surplus mode activates (e.g. 15 min)

batterySOCEnabled.label: Consider home battery
batterySOCEnabled.description: Consider home battery state of charge as a condition for surplus mode. Disable if no home battery is installed.

batterySOCThreshold.label: Battery state of charge threshold (%)
batterySOCThreshold.description: Minimum home battery state of charge in percent required for surplus mode (e.g. 90 %)

outsideTempLowerThreshold.label: Outside temperature from (°C)
outsideTempLowerThreshold.description: Condition 2 becomes eligible above this outside temperature. Surplus mode activates only once the minimum feed-in has also been stable for the stabilisation time (e.g. 12 °C)

outsideTempUpperThreshold.label: Outside temperature from (°C)
outsideTempUpperThreshold.description: Above this outside temperature, surplus mode activates immediately once the minimum feed-in is reached — no stabilisation time required (e.g. 20 °C)

currentTempEnabled.label: Consider current tank temperature
currentTempEnabled.description: Only activate surplus mode when the tank has already reached a minimum temperature. Prevents unwanted effects when the temperature gap to the setpoint is too large.

currentTempThreshold.label: Minimum current temperature (°C)
currentTempThreshold.description: The tank must be at or above this temperature before surplus mode activates.

surplusValue.label: Surplus mode value
surplusValue.description: Output value when surplus mode is active (type: bool, string, or msg attribute)

normalValue.label: Normal mode value
normalValue.description: Output value when normal operation mode is active (type: bool, string, or msg attribute)

surplusTemperature.label: Surplus target temperature (°C)
surplusTemperature.description: Target water temperature in surplus mode

normalTemperature.label: Normal target temperature (°C)
normalTemperature.description: Target water temperature in normal operation mode

activeCondition.name: Active condition
activeCondition.description: Condition to determine when the controller is active

manualControl.name: Manual control
manualControl.description: Manual override: true forces surplus mode, false forces normal mode. Blocks automatic control until the reactivate timer fires.

gridDelivery.name: Grid delivery (W)
gridDelivery.description: Current grid feed-in power in watts

batterySOC.name: Battery state of charge (%)
batterySOC.description: Current home battery state of charge in percent

outsideTemperature.name: Outside temperature (°C)
outsideTemperature.description: Current outside temperature in degrees Celsius

currentWaterTemperature.name: Current temperature (°C)
currentWaterTemperature.description: Current actual temperature of the warm water tank in degrees Celsius

operationMode.name: Operation mode
operationMode.description: Current operation mode: surplus or normal

targetTemperature.name: Target temperature
targetTemperature.description: Target water temperature based on current operation mode
